_comment: Authoritative source governance registry. Phase 11 adds public Workday, SmartRecruiters, Workable and controlled official-page source families.

sources.name: ReliefWeb
sources.notes: UN OCHA institutional aggregator. Listings are curated and trusted, but employer-official records take precedence when the same vacancy is available directly.

sources.name: Greenhouse-hosted employer board
sources.notes: Each Greenhouse board (boards.greenhouse.io/<company>) is the employer's own ATS-hosted posting and apply flow - not a third-party repost. Treated as official for the same reason a company's /careers page is: the fetch target IS the employer's own hiring system.

sources.name: Lever-hosted employer board
sources.notes: Same logic as Greenhouse. jobs.lever.co/<company> is the employer's own ATS-hosted posting; applyUrl points back to the same board's apply endpoint.

sources.name: Adzuna
sources.notes: Job aggregator, not the employer's own channel - redirect_url points at Adzuna's own tracked link, not directly at the employer. South Africa coverage only within Africa; see collectors/adzuna.py for why.

sources.name: Ashby-hosted employer board
sources.notes: Same logic as Greenhouse/Lever - jobs.ashbyhq.com/<company> is the employer's own ATS-hosted posting and apply flow.

sources.name: Pinpoint-hosted employer board
sources.notes: Same logic as Greenhouse/Lever/Ashby - {subdomain}.pinpointhq.com/postings.json is the employer's own ATS-hosted posting, explicitly documented by Pinpoint for third-party listing use. Added after Sun King (originally guessed as Lever) turned out to be on Pinpoint instead.

sources.name: Himalayas
sources.notes: Global remote-jobs board, not the employer's own channel - genuinely free public API, verified directly against Himalayas's own docs before adding.

sources.name: Remotive
sources.notes: Global remote-jobs board - genuinely free public API per Remotive's own GitHub docs, 24h publication delay on their side.

sources.name: Jobicy
sources.notes: Global remote-jobs board, skews Americas/Europe-EMEA per Jobicy's own docs - genuinely free public API, 6h publication delay on their side.

sources.name: RemoteOK
sources.notes: Global remote-jobs board, tech-skewed - long-established genuinely free public API.

sources.name: Arbeitnow
sources.notes: Europe/DACH-focused job board with visa-sponsorship as a core theme - genuinely free public API, CORS-enabled.

sources.name: YALI Network
sources.notes: U.S. Department of State's own fellowship platform.

sources.name: Employer career page
sources.notes: Any listing fetched directly from an organisation's own /careers or /jobs page - confidence comes from the fetch target, not a fixed domain list.

sources.name: BrighterMonday
sources.notes: Reputable Kenyan job board, but a third-party repost - never the employer's own page.

sources.name: Newsletter or WhatsApp forward
sources.notes: No independent way to verify the original poster - mark community, never aggregated or official, regardless of how the content reads.

sources.name: Recruitee-hosted employer board
sources.notes: Public Careers Site API hosted for the employer; application flow is employer-controlled.

sources.name: UN Talent
sources.notes: Institutional UN vacancy discovery feed. Direct employer application links are preferred when supplied.

sources.name: Cornerstone-hosted institutional board
sources.notes: Public employer-controlled Cornerstone career site.

sources.name: SuccessFactors-hosted institutional board
sources.notes: Public employer-controlled SAP SuccessFactors career site.

sources.name: Oracle Candidate Experience institutional board
sources.notes: Public employer-controlled Oracle Candidate Experience career site.

sources.name: DFI and multilateral official career page
sources.notes: Official institution careers page or vacancy archive.

sources.name: PageUp-hosted institutional board
sources.notes: Public employer-controlled PageUp careers site.

sources.name: NGO and UN official career page
sources.notes: Official NGO, UN agency, development implementer or regional-body careers page.

sources.name: Official government vacancy portal
sources.notes: Official public-service vacancy portal.

sources.name: Official government vacancy document
sources.notes: Official government PDF vacancy advertisement.

sources.name: Official government vacancy circular
sources.notes: Official public-service circular or advertisement index.

sources.name: Workday-hosted employer career site
sources.notes: Public employer-controlled Workday Candidate Experience search endpoints.

sources.name: SmartRecruiters-hosted employer board
sources.notes: Public employer postings exposed through SmartRecruiters company boards.

sources.name: Workable-hosted employer board
sources.notes: Public employer postings exposed through Workable apply sites.

sources.name: Multinational employer official careers
sources.notes: Registry-driven official employer career pages; domain is a governance label because each target has its own official domain.

sources.name: Kenya public institution official careers
sources.notes: Registry-driven official careers and vacancy pages for Kenyan regulators, universities, utilities and state corporations.
